parsed.production_notes: The first 12 seconds consist of AI-generated clips, evidenced by morphing facial features, unnatural physics (like the skateboard scene), and a hyper-realistic, overly perfect lighting style. The remainder of the video is human-recorded, featuring natural interactions, realistic textures, and typical 360-camera distortion.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, tanned complexion. She has long, voluminous, wavy brown hair. Her facial features are expressive and friendly.
characters.wardrobe: In the AI montage, she wears various outfits including a white top, bikini, and swimsuit. In the human-recorded sections, she wears a brown tank top and white skirt, later changing to a light beige button-down shirt.

characters.appearance: Adult male, medium build. Partially visible.

characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with white text, blue towel draped over his shoulder.

scenes.setting: Various locations including an airplane, beach, jungle, waterfall, and street.

panels.panel_visual_description: A rapid montage of Character A in various locations. She is seen looking out an airplane window, walking on a beach at sunset, skateboarding in a jungle, sitting by a waterfall, standing in a field, and riding a scooter. The scenes have a slightly surreal, hyper-realistic quality typical of AI generation. The lighting is dramatic and perfectly stylized in each shot.

scenes.visual_description: A montage of AI-generated clips showing a woman traveling through various scenic locations. Text overlays describe her experience switching from Duolingo to a new language app. The text appears in the center of the screen, changing with the shots.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I had a 574 days streak on Duolingo but couldn't order tacos
Then I switched to this immersive Spanish app
In 72 hours, I started getting TikToks in Spanish
In 10 days, I understood the full bad bunny album.
Using the immersion method actually helps you speak words and hear sounds without thinking.
I started the app 2.5 months ago and today I'm talking like a native.

scenes.setting: A crowded shop filled with colorful woven blankets and bags.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a shop filled with colorful woven textiles. She points to a specific blanket hanging among many others. Character B, partially visible in the background, assists her. The camera angle is wide and slightly distorted, suggesting a 360-degree camera held by Character A. The lighting is natural indoor lighting.

scenes.visual_description: A first-person view of a woman shopping for blankets. Text overlays at the top explain the premise of the video. Subtitles translate the Spanish conversation into English at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Este? [This one?]
Character B says: ¿Este? [This one?]
Character A says: Sí. ¿En cuánto está? [Yes. How much is it?]
Character B says: Seis ochenta. [Six eighty.]
Character A says: ¿Seis ochenta? [Six eighty?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
POV: you switch from Duolingo to Speak and have the best trip of your life bc you can actually talk to locals
this one?, YES
$680

scenes.setting: An outdoor fruit stand on a paved street, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: The camera looks down at an outdoor fruit stand displaying various fruits in baskets. Character C and another woman are seated behind the stand. The perspective is from someone standing in front of the stand, reaching out to point at a bag of red fruit. The setting appears to be a sunny street in a town with natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: A first-person view of a woman buying fruit at a street stand. Text overlays remain at the top. Subtitles translate the conversation at the bottom, highlighting the words as they are spoken.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hola, buenos días. ¿Cuánto sería? [Hello, good morning. How much would it be?]
Character C says: ¿Aquí en la bolsa? [Here in the bag?]
Character A says: Sí. [Yes.]
Character C says: Diez. [Ten.]
Character A says: ¿Diez? Okay. Muchísimas gracias. [Ten? Okay. Thank you very much.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
POV: you switch from Duolingo to Speak and have the best trip of your life bc you can actually talk to locals

HOW MUCH? HERE IN

scenes.setting: Another fruit stand, next to a blue store front.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character D stands behind a small wooden cart displaying various fruits. He holds a clear plastic cup filled with red fruit. The camera perspective is from someone standing in front of him, holding out their hand. Character D sprinkles something from a small bottle onto the person's hand. The person then tastes it and reacts with a smile. Character A and Character D pose for a photo together at the end.

scenes.visual_description: A first-person view of a woman trying spicy fruit from a vendor. Text overlays remain at the top. Subtitles translate the conversation at the bottom. The video ends with the woman and vendor posing for the camera.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Súper picante? [Super spicy?]
Character D says: Sí, muy picante. [Yes, very spicy.]
Character A says: ¿Puedo probar un poquito? [Can I try a little bit?]
Character D says: [sprinkles spice]
Character A says: ¡Uf! Gracias. [Oof! Thank you.]
